import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut has = false
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    else if b == 45 and not has
      sign = 0 - 1
    else
      if has
        nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign * 2)
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
        has = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in nums
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
